# General Requirements Quality Checklist: Pokedex Page

**Purpose**: Validate the quality, clarity, and completeness of the Pokedex Page specification requirements
**Created**: 2026-05-24
**Feature**: [spec.md](../spec.md)

**Note**: This checklist is generated by the `/speckit.checklist` command based on feature context and requirements.

## Requirement Completeness

- [ ] CHK001 - Is the button's visual treatment (size, color, position on home page) explicitly specified beyond the label "Pokedex"? [Completeness, Spec §FR-001]
- [ ] CHK002 - Are the exact data fields to extract from the PokéAPI response documented (e.g., which sprite variant, ID format)? [Completeness, Spec §FR-003]
- [ ] CHK003 - Are retry/recovery requirements defined for the error state, given the edge case mentions "option to retry" but no FR covers it? [Gap, Spec §Edge Cases]
- [ ] CHK004 - Are the visual properties of the loading indicator (spinner, skeleton, progress bar) specified? [Gap, Spec §FR-005]
- [ ] CHK005 - Is the "user-friendly error message" content, tone, or structure defined with specific criteria? [Completeness, Spec §FR-006]

## Requirement Clarity

- [ ] CHK006 - Is "prominently" (describing the Pokedex button visibility) quantified with measurable positioning or sizing criteria? [Clarity, Spec §FR-001]
- [ ] CHK007 - Is the pagination approach explicitly selected between "pagination" and "infinite scroll", or is the ambiguity acceptable? [Ambiguity, Spec §FR-007]
- [ ] CHK008 - Is "representative image" defined — specifically which PokéAPI sprite (front_default, official artwork, etc.) should be used? [Clarity, Spec §FR-004]
- [ ] CHK009 - Is "responsive grid layout" defined with breakpoint behavior, column counts, or minimum card widths? [Ambiguity, Spec §FR-004]
- [ ] CHK010 - Is "standard broadband connection" quantified with a minimum bandwidth assumption for the 5-second render target? [Clarity, Spec §SC-002]

## Requirement Consistency

- [ ] CHK011 - Does FR-003 ("a public Pokémon API") need updating to reflect the clarified choice of PokéAPI documented in Clarifications and Assumptions? [Consistency, Spec §FR-003 / Clarifications]
- [ ] CHK012 - Do the "option to retry" in edge cases and the loading/timeout behavior conflict — should retry reset the 15-second timeout or extend it? [Conflict, Spec §Edge Cases]

## Acceptance Criteria Quality

- [ ] CHK013 - Can SC-003 ("100% of API failure scenarios") be objectively measured given that all possible failure modes are not enumerated in the spec? [Measurability, Spec §SC-003]
- [ ] CHK014 - Is SC-004 ("without experiencing layout shifts") measurable without a defined tolerance or definition of what constitutes a layout shift? [Measurability, Spec §SC-004]

## Scenario Coverage

- [ ] CHK015 - Are requirements defined for the scenario where the API returns successfully but the response contains zero Pokémon? (Edge case exists but no corresponding FR) [Coverage, Spec §Edge Cases]
- [ ] CHK016 - Are requirements defined for partial load failures — where some Pokémon images load and others fail — beyond the single-image fallback? [Coverage, Gap]
- [ ] CHK017 - Are requirements defined for the user rapidly navigating back to home and returning to Pokedex (concurrent/rapid navigation)? [Gap]

## Edge Case Coverage

- [ ] CHK018 - Are PokéAPI rate limiting scenarios addressed in requirements (e.g., 429 responses, request throttling)? [Gap]
- [ ] CHK019 - Are requirements specified for handling Pokémon with very long names that may overflow the card grid layout? [Edge Case, Gap]

## Non-Functional Requirements

- [ ] CHK020 - Are accessibility requirements specified for the interactive elements (button, grid, load-more trigger), including keyboard navigation and screen reader labeling? [Gap]
- [ ] CHK021 - Are metadata/page-title requirements defined for the Pokedex page (browser tab title, description)? [Gap]

## Dependencies & Assumptions

- [ ] CHK022 - Is the assumption "the application already has a home page and routing infrastructure" validated, or does it need an explicit dependency declaration? [Assumption, Spec §Assumptions]
- [ ] CHK023 - Is there a fallback or alternative plan documented if PokéAPI becomes unavailable or changes its endpoints? [Assumption, Spec §Assumptions]

## Notes

- Check items off as completed: `[x]`
- Add comments or findings inline
- Link to relevant resources or documentation
- Items are numbered sequentially (CHK001–CHK023) for easy reference
